A FREE FIELD GUIDE

It Starts With Safety.

A field guide for organizational leaders navigating AI.

Sixteen pages. Six sections. One self-assessment your leadership team can complete in 30 minutes. Written by the team behind Movemental's facilitated Safety MVP — built for the senior leaders responsible for governance, formation, and the trust of the people they serve.

Jump to download arrow_downward

MOVEMENTAL LEDGER

Safety First

A field guide to organizational AI governance.

WHAT'S IN THE TOOLKIT

Sixteen pages of operational substance.

Why Safety is first

The argument for governance before deployment, with sector data on what happens when organizations skip this stage.

The seven artifacts named

Each artifact described, scoped, and exemplified with sample language.

The self-assessment

Ten questions your leadership team can use to evaluate your current Safety readiness.

Common mistakes

The patterns we see in organizations that try to govern AI without facilitation, and what to do instead.

The two-week MVP preview

A walkthrough of what a facilitated Safety engagement looks like, so you know what you're considering.

Named refusals

The most important section. The applications of AI that we believe organizations should refuse on principle, regardless of pressure.

Send the toolkit to your inbox.

One email field. We'll send the PDF immediately and follow up once over the next week. We won't share your email, and we won't add you to a generic newsletter.

By submitting your email, you'll receive the toolkit immediately and a brief three-email sequence over the following week. Unsubscribe at any time.

Day 0 — The toolkit arrives in your inbox. Start with the self-assessment. Day 3 — A short follow-up offering a 30-minute conversation if you have questions. Day 7 — A brief note about the $1,000 facilitated MVP, in case you're ready to begin. That's it. No drip campaign. No automated nurture sequence. Three emails, then we leave you alone unless you reply.

Or skip ahead.

If you've already read enough about AI governance and you're ready to talk about a facilitated Safety engagement, you can skip the toolkit and start a conversation directly.

Start a conversation instead arrow_forward
